mdRecord.dcterms:title: Fiduciary Accounts: Guardianship of Martha W. Walton, Until she turned 21 years of age 12.19.1895
mdRecord.dcterms:description: Guardianship of Martha W. Walton, Until she turned 21 years of age 12.19.1895 Guardianship of Daniel W. Walton, Until he turned 21 Years of age 05.24.1897 Guardianship of Laura B., Nora F., Nancy E., and Kinner K. Walton James W. Walton, Guardian Recorded in Ledger Book 4, page 484-485, in the Floyd County Courthouse.
mdRecord.dcterms:subject: Court Records
mdRecord.dcterms:provenance: Virginia Polytechnic Institute and State University. University Libraries
